news:news.news:title: Ukraine's President Zelensky criticized US envoys for not visiting Kyiv, while Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws were ruled in breach of EU values.

news:news.news:keywords: Federal Reserve nomination news, gig economy in healthcare, Purdue Pharma settlement details, Apple leadership transition, oil prices and market reactions

news:news.news:title: Billy Donovan has stepped down as head coach of the Bulls, while playoff action intensifies with notable performances and controversies in the NBA and NHL.

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new state of matter in Uranus and Neptune, advanced imaging techniques, and breakthroughs in environmental and medical applications.
news:news.news:keywords: new state of matter in planets, advanced imaging technology, environmental science breakthroughs, medical discoveries in skincare, sustainable energy solutions
